zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期偏空整理
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格在1922附近震荡，距离20日均线1973仍有明显下行压力，显示短期价格走势偏弱。价格未能有效突破近期高点1932，说明多头动能有限，市场存在一定观望情绪。  

MACD指标为-17.87，处于负值区间，表明下行趋势仍在延续，但未出现明显加速下跌信号。由于RSI数据缺失，短期超买或超卖判断受限，但价格接近支撑1920区域，可能出现技术性反弹。  

短线支撑位在1920附近，若跌破则下方关注1900心理关口；阻力位主要在1935-1940区间，多次尝试未能突破可视为短期压力区。投资者应关注价格能否稳住支撑，并留意突破阻力后的确认信号。  

交易策略上，短线可采取区间操作，低位1920附近可小仓位布局多单，高位1935-1940附近可考虑减仓或短线空单。中期偏空趋势尚未改变，激进交易者可关注趋势线下方的顺势做空机会，同时控制仓位和止损风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently showing signs of short-term weakness against the US Dollar, trading at $1922.26 after a minor 0.34% decline over the past 24 hours. Price action has stayed close to the daily low of $1921.21, indicating selling pressure around the $1930 resistance level. The downward move beneath the 20-day simple moving average at $1973.47 reinforces a cautious trend perspective, suggesting the market may face further pressure unless buyers regain control above this key dynamic level.  

Technical indicators provide mixed signals. The MACD at -17.87 points to bearish momentum, though the absence of the signal line limits precise crossover analysis. While the RSI isn’t currently available, the price trading below its short-term SMA suggests momentum favors sellers in the near term. Traders should watch for any MACD convergence or divergence patterns as potential early warning signals for trend reversal or continuation.  

Support and resistance levels are crucial to consider. Immediate support lies around the $1920 mark, a level that has held during recent intraday dips. Below that, $1900 represents a psychological support zone that could attract buying interest. On the upside, resistance is near $1935–$1940, with a more substantial barrier at the SMA(20) near $1973. A break above these levels would likely open the path toward $2000, while failure to hold support could trigger further downside toward $1890.  

For traders, a cautious approach is advised. Short-term strategies may favor selective selling near resistance and defensive stops just below $1920. Longer-term investors could consider waiting for confirmation of a sustained breakout above the SMA(20) before committing additional capital. Monitoring volume and any emerging reversal patterns will be critical for timing entries and exits efficiently, especially in a market exhibiting subtle bearish momentum yet remaining close to consolidation levels.
